Shape Glyph Run
GlyphRun as shape-batch renderer (not text)
① xOffsets — four shapes, uniform spacing (no transform)
   
② positions — per-shape xy nudge (±8px)
   
③ scales — 0.6× / 0.8× / 1.0× / 1.2× (anchor at centre)
   
④ skews — -20° / +20° / -20° / +20°
   
⑤ anchors — different pivot points, all scaled 1.4×
   
⑥ combined — pos + anchor + skew + scale
   
⑦ bitmap — star (glyph offset) + heart (no offset), alternating
     
